summary: Iteration 26 - Razorpay Orders API Fix VERIFIED. All backend tests pass (7/7). Both Book Service and Shop checkout flows successfully open Razorpay popup with valid order_id. NO 'Payment Failed' error observed.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend book_service endpoint (lines 4248-4309) correctly creates Razorpay order using razorpay_client.order.create() and returns razorpay_order_id
Backend shop/orders endpoint (lines 4762-4867) creates Razorpay order for payment_method='razorpay' and correctly skips for 'cod'
Frontend App.js handleBookService (lines 549-637) uses razorpay_order_id from API response when calling Razorpay.open()
Frontend Shop.js placeOrder (lines 218-327) uses razorpay_order_id from API response for Razorpay checkout
Razorpay client is properly initialized with RAZORPAY_KEY_ID and RAZORPAY_KEY_SECRET credentials
Order IDs follow correct format: order_XXXXXXXXXXXXX (starts with 'order_', 20+ chars)

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Both Book Service modal and Shop checkout Razorpay flows verified working

seed_data_creation: No new seed data - used existing products for shop cart testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Razorpay Orders API fix fully verified in iteration 26. Key findings: (1) Backend APIs /api/shop/book-service and /api/shop/orders now return valid razorpay_order_id starting with 'order_', (2) Frontend correctly passes order_id to Razorpay.open(), (3) Both Book Service modal and Shop checkout successfully open Razorpay popup without 'Payment Failed' error, (4) Backend tests created in /app/backend/tests/test_razorpay_orders.py for regression testing.

backend_book_service_api.evidence: API returns razorpay_order_id starting with 'order_', key_id starting with 'rzp_'

backend_shop_orders_api_razorpay.evidence: API returns razorpay_order_id and key_id for Razorpay payments

backend_shop_orders_api_cod.evidence: API returns razorpay_order_id=null and key_id=null for COD orders

frontend_book_service_modal.test: Book Service modal opens Razorpay checkout
frontend_book_service_modal.evidence: Razorpay iframe at api.razorpay.com detected, shows 'ASR Enterprises', Price: 1500, Payment Options visible

frontend_shop_checkout.evidence: Razorpay iframe detected, checkout modal showing customer details, Pay Online selected, Razorpay popup opened

no_payment_failed_error.evidence: Razorpay checkout opened successfully in both flows without error alerts

bug_fix_verification.original_issue: User reported 'Oops! Something went wrong. Payment Failed' error when trying to book service
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: Razorpay checkout was being opened WITHOUT a proper Razorpay order_id (using deprecated 'button' mode with just key + amount)
bug_fix_verification.fix_implemented: Backend now creates Razorpay order using razorpay-python SDK's order.create() API, returns razorpay_order_id to frontend, frontend passes order_id to Razorpay.open()
bug_fix_verification.verification_result: FIXED - Both Book Service and Shop checkout Razorpay popups open successfully without 'Payment Failed' error

rca_of_the_issue: The previous implementation was using Razorpay's deprecated 'button' mode (just key + amount) which caused 'Payment Failed' errors on live transactions. The fix implements the proper Razorpay Orders API flow: 1) Backend creates Razorpay order using razorpay-python SDK with amount in paise, 2) Returns razorpay_order_id to frontend, 3) Frontend passes order_id to Razorpay.open() options. This is the recommended Razorpay integration pattern for production environments.
